    "RX.5": 1.0
  },
  "active_set": [
    "R1.1",
    "R1.2",
    "R1.4",
    "R1.7",
    "RX.1",
    "RX.2",
    "RX.3",
    "RX.4",
    "RX.5"
  ],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "The request 'Check this' is ambiguous. Do you primarily want: (A) a light proofread for grammar and clarity, (B) a technical review of the method's logic and novelty, or (C) a comprehensive peer review of the entire research contribution?",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The request implies a check on whether the core contribution and its framing are clear and compelling.",
    "R1.2": "A core part of 'checking' a technical artifact is verifying the internal logical consistency of the proposed method.",
    "R1.4": "The request entails assessing the claimed novelty against the described prior work to see if it is well-supported.",
    "R1.7": "Checking the artifact includes evaluating if the scholarship is accurate and the relevant literature is adequately covered.",
    "RX.1": "The agent must be transparent about the limits of its analysis based solely on the provided text.",
    "RX.2": "The agent's findings must be stated carefully to avoid misrepresenting the artifact's strengths or weaknesses.",
    "RX.3": "The agent must confine its analysis to the implicit scope of a technical check and not rewrite the content.",
    "RX.4": "The agent's feedback should not inadvertently introduce or endorse technically unsound or harmful ideas.",
    "RX.5": "All points in the agent's check must be directly traceable to specific elements of the artifact."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: The request 'Check this' is ambiguous. Do you primarily want: (A) a light proofread for grammar and clarity, (B) a technical review of the method's logic and novelty, or (C) a comprehensive peer review of the entire research contribution?

rationale.R1.1: The request implies a check on whether the core contribution and its framing are clear and compelling.
rationale.R1.2: A core part of 'checking' a technical artifact is verifying the internal logical consistency of the proposed method.
rationale.R1.4: The request entails assessing the claimed novelty against the described prior work to see if it is well-supported.
rationale.R1.7: Checking the artifact includes evaluating if the scholarship is accurate and the relevant literature is adequately covered.
rationale.RX.1: The agent must be transparent about the limits of its analysis based solely on the provided text.
rationale.RX.2: The agent's findings must be stated carefully to avoid misrepresenting the artifact's strengths or weaknesses.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must confine its analysis to the implicit scope of a technical check and not rewrite the content.
rationale.RX.4: The agent's feedback should not inadvertently introduce or endorse technically unsound or harmful ideas.
rationale.RX.5: All points in the agent's check must be directly traceable to specific elements of the artifact.
